hypothesis: If neural network Bayesian Algorithm Execution is applied to nudged elastic band calculations by iteratively fine-tuning a pre-trained equivariant neural network potential on strategically acquired points along the minimum energy path, then it will converge to accurate minimum energy paths with significantly fewer expensive simulator evaluations compared to conventional NEB methods, because the surrogate model focuses sampling on the most informative configurations along the reaction pathway rather than uniformly querying the simulator.
